title: ShortBoi's Extras
description: Adds a few things that I felt should be in the game. This is my first mod :D
body:
# **Discontinued due to me being stupid and not saving the MCreator file**

# ShortBoi's Extras!
## Adds the following things:
### Potions:
- Potion of Constipation
- Splash Potion of Resistance IV
- Lingering Potion of Resistance IV
- Tipped arrow of Resistance IV
- Potion of Stealth
- Splash Potion of Stealth
- Lingering Potion of Stealth
- Tipped arrow of Stealth
###  Items:
- Master Sword from the Legend of Zelda
- Hylian Shield from the Legend of Zelda
- Zeldarite ingot
- Bic lighter (portal igniter)
- Secret Item
- Poop food item
- Baguette Food Item and Sword
###  Music Discs:
- Aria Math music disc
- Dreiton music disc
- Wet Hands music disc
- Haggstrom music disc
- Mice on Venus music disc
- Minecraft music disc
- Subwoofer Lullaby music disc
- Buddy Holly but Stal music disc
- Africa by Toto music disc
- From The Start by Laufey music disc
### Mobs:
- Musician villager (job site block: jukebox)
- Banshee 
- Mob Fanatic villager (job site block: sculk catalyst)
###  Blocks and Ores:
- Zeldarite ore
- Zeldarite block
### Paintings:
- One of Bob Ross's paintings
- Mona Lisa painting
- A painting of one of my friends
- A Weezer painting
### Biomes and Dimensions:
- Badwoods biome
- Sky portal
- Sky dimension
### Structures:
- Castle structure
### Other stuff:
- "ShortBoi's Extras" creative tab

### _Known bugs:_
- Sky dimension is bugged and only spawns at 0 ~ 0
- Music discs have a very large radius
- Hylian Shield blocking animation is bugged

### **You are allowed to add this mod to any modpack if you credit me :D**
## Created with MCreator
